title: Easy Sun-Dried Tomato And Harissa Pasta
summary: This quick and easy pasta sauce is made with just 4 ingredients and comes together in no time. It's creamy, tomatoey and a little bit spicy.

ingredients.label: 1 x 400g Tin Or Jar Of Butter Beans
ingredients.name: Drained Cooked Butter Beans

ingredients.label: 1 x 400g Tin Or Jar Of Butter Beans
ingredients.name: Bean

ingredients.label: 6 Sun Dried Tomatoes (Plus More For Garnish)
ingredients.name: Sun-Dried Tomato

ingredients.label: 6 Sun Dried Tomatoes (Plus More For Garnish)
ingredients.name: Tomato

method.description: Add the butterbeans plus their liquid to a high speed blender, along with the sun-dried tomatoes, 1 tbsp of oil from the jar and 1-3 tbsp of harissa, depending on how spicy you would like it to be. Blend until smooth and season well with salt and pepper.
Cook your pasta to al dente. Save a mug of pasta water before you drain the pasta. Put the pasta back into the saucepan it was cooked in.
Pour the sauce into the pan with the pasta to heat through on a low heat. Add the reserved pasta water, bit by bit, until you have a perfectly silky sauce.
To serve, dish the pasta onto two plates and serve with some extra slices of sun-dried tomato on top.

chefs.name: Christina Soteriou
chefs.summary: Christina (@christinasots) is a plant-based chef and recipe developer with a love for the Mediterranean flavours of her home, Cyprus. With an equal balance of healthy, flavourful and easy to make, there are no compromises here!
